languages.text: "Штрафной полк, значит? И много у вас тут всяческого сброда? Мародеров, грабителей...воров?"

traits.locale_text: "Штрафной полк, значит? И много у вас тут всяческого сброда? Мародеров, грабителей...воров?"

languages.text: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"
languages.original_text: "Штрафной полк, значит? И много у вас тут всяческого сброда? Мародеров, грабителей...воров?"

traits.locale_text: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"
"A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"
"A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"

languages.text: “判罪军团是吗？想必里面全是些乌合之众？土匪、强盗、小偷之流？”
languages.original_text: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"

traits.locale_text: “判罪军团是吗？想必里面全是些乌合之众？土匪、强盗、小偷之流？”

languages.text: « C'est un régiment pénal, alors ? Sûrement rempli de bandits, de voleurs et d'autres canailles de cet acabit. »
languages.original_text: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"

traits.locale_text: « C'est un régiment pénal, alors ? Sûrement rempli de bandits, de voleurs et d'autres canailles de cet acabit. »

languages.text: "Ceza infaz alayı demek. Hem de avamla dolu. Haydutlar, soyguncular... Hırsızlar sürüsü."
languages.original_text: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"

traits.locale_text: "Ceza infaz alayı demek. Hem de avamla dolu. Haydutlar, soyguncular... Hırsızlar sürüsü."

languages.text: «¿Un regimiento penal, entonces? Lleno de chusma, imagino. ¿Forajidos, salteadores... ladrones?».
languages.original_text: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Un regimiento penal, entonces? Lleno de chusma, imagino. ¿Forajidos, salteadores... ladrones?».

languages.text: "Also ein Strafregiment? Voller Gesindel, nehme ich an? Briganten, Räuber ... Diebe?"
languages.original_text: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"

traits.locale_text: "Also ein Strafregiment? Voller Gesindel, nehme ich an? Briganten, Räuber ... Diebe?"

languages.text: 「罰の連隊か。きっと、悪党ばかりだろうな。強盗、泥棒…盗賊？」
languages.original_text: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"

traits.locale_text: 「罰の連隊か。きっと、悪党ばかりだろうな。強盗、泥棒…盗賊？」
